title: Enterprise Software Development Agreement — Revision History

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.text: Developer means CodeForge Systems Inc. Client means MegaRetail Corp. Software means the custom ERP platform.

clauses.title: Scope
clauses.text: Developer shall design, develop, test, and deploy the Software per Schedule A milestones.

clauses.title: Payment
clauses.text: Client pays $500K upon signing, milestone payments per Schedule B, and $500K upon final acceptance.

clauses.title: Timeline
clauses.text: Development shall be completed within eighteen (18) months of the Effective Date.

clauses.title: IP
clauses.text: Upon full payment, all IP in the Software transfers to Client. Developer retains rights in pre-existing tools.

clauses.title: Acceptance
clauses.text: If the Software fails acceptance testing, the Client shall notify the Developer in writing within ten (10) business days, specifying all deficiencies. The Developer shall correct all identified deficiencies within twenty (20) business days. If deficiencies are not corrected within this cure period, the Client may terminate this Agreement and receive a full refund of all payments made.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: Laws of the State of Washington. Disputes resolved in King County Superior Court.

clauses.title: Definitions

clauses.title: Scope
clauses.text: Developer shall design, develop, test, and deploy the Software per Schedule A milestones.

clauses.title: Payment
clauses.text: Client pays $500K upon signing, milestone payments per Schedule B, and $500K upon final acceptance.

clauses.title: Timeline
clauses.text: Development shall be completed within eighteen (18) months of the Effective Date.

clauses.title: IP
clauses.text: Upon full payment, all IP in the Software transfers to Client. Developer retains rights in pre-existing tools.

clauses.title: Acceptance
clauses.text: If the Software fails acceptance testing, the Client shall notify the Developer in writing within ten (10) business days, specifying all deficiencies. clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: Laws of the State of Washington. Disputes resolved in King County Superior Court.

clauses.title: Warranty
clauses.text: Developer warrants Software conformance to specs for twelve (12) months.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Both parties protect confidential info for five (5) years.

clauses.title: Liability
clauses.text: Developer total liability capped at total contract value.

clauses.title: Damages Exclusion
clauses.text: Neither party liable for consequential, incidental, or punitive damages regardless of cause.

clauses.title: Change Orders
clauses.text: Scope changes require written change orders signed by both parties.

clauses.title: Testing Standards
clauses.text: Acceptance testing shall follow the test plan in Schedule C.

clauses.title: Source Code Escrow
clauses.text: Developer shall deposit source code in escrow with a neutral third party.

clauses.title: Insurance
clauses.text: Developer maintains E&O insurance of $5M.

clauses.title: Timeline Extension
clauses.text: The eighteen-month timeline may be extended by mutual written agreement for up to six (6) additional months.

clauses.title: Force Majeure
clauses.text: Timeline tolled during force majeure events.

clauses.title: Indemnification
clauses.text: Developer indemnifies Client against third-party IP infringement claims.

clauses.title: Deemed Acceptance Protocol
clauses.text: In the event that the Client does not submit a comprehensive written deficiency report within the acceptance testing window, the Software shall be irrevocably deemed accepted in its entirety, all milestone payments shall become immediately due and non-refundable, and the Client shall have permanently waived any and all rights to reject the Software, request corrections, or seek refund under any provision of this Agreement.

version_history.author: Drafter
version_history.change_summary: Developer adds deemed acceptance protocol and training provisions.

clauses.text: Developer means CodeForge Systems Inc. Client means MegaRetail Corp. Software means the custom ERP platform.

clauses.title: Scope
clauses.text: Developer shall design, develop, test, and deploy the Software per Schedule A milestones.

clauses.title: Payment
clauses.text: Client pays $500K upon signing, milestone payments per Schedule B, and $500K upon final acceptance.

clauses.title: Timeline
clauses.text: Development shall be completed within eighteen (18) months of the Effective Date.

clauses.title: IP
clauses.text: Upon full payment, all IP in the Software transfers to Client. Developer retains rights in pre-existing tools.

clauses.title: Acceptance
clauses.text: If the Software fails acceptance testing, the Client shall notify the Developer in writing within ten (10) business days, specifying all deficiencies. The Developer shall correct all identified deficiencies within twenty (20) business days. If deficiencies are not corrected within this cure period, the Client may terminate this Agreement and receive a full refund of all payments made.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: Laws of the State of Washington. Disputes resolved in King County Superior Court.

clauses.title: Warranty
clauses.text: Developer warrants Software conformance to specs for twelve (12) months.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Both parties protect confidential info for five (5) years.

clauses.title: Liability
clauses.text: Developer total liability capped at total contract value.

clauses.title: Damages Exclusion
clauses.text: Neither party liable for consequential, incidental, or punitive damages regardless of cause.

clauses.title: Change Orders
clauses.text: Scope changes require written change orders signed by both parties.

clauses.title: Testing Standards
clauses.text: Acceptance testing shall follow the test plan in Schedule C.

clauses.title: Source Code Escrow
clauses.text: Developer shall deposit source code in escrow with a neutral third party.

clauses.title: Insurance
clauses.text: Developer maintains E&O insurance of $5M.

clauses.title: Timeline Extension
clauses.text: The eighteen-month timeline may be extended by mutual written agreement for up to six (6) additional months.

clauses.title: Force Majeure
clauses.text: Timeline tolled during force majeure events.

clauses.title: Indemnification
clauses.text: Developer indemnifies Client against third-party IP infringement claims.

clauses.title: Deemed Acceptance Protocol
clauses.text: In the event that the Client does not submit a comprehensive written deficiency report within the acceptance testing window, the Software shall be irrevocably deemed accepted in its entirety, all milestone payments shall become immediately due and non-refundable, and the Client shall have permanently waived any and all rights to reject the Software, request corrections, or seek refund under any provision of this Agreement.

clauses.title: Training
clauses.text: Developer provides 40 hours of end-user training.

clauses.title: Maintenance Fees
clauses.text: Annual maintenance fees of 15% of total contract value are due regardless of any payment disputes on the core project.

clauses.title: Audit Rights
clauses.text: Client may audit Developer project records annually.

clauses.title: Entire Agreement
clauses.text: This Agreement is the entire agreement between the parties.

clauses.title: Counterparts
clauses.text: Executed in counterparts.
